layout_any_strings: GitHub repository malwaredevil/dcoir-collector is the sole working source for readable governed text files.
GitHub repository malwaredevil/dcoir-collector is the sole readable working-source location for governed text.

helper_memory.rule: Do not use Skill State Registry as a replacement for per-skill durable memory tables.

current_authority_model.workspace_model: Airtable-first execution state; GitHub governed readable source/control plane/promoted history; Project space bootstrap/runtime anchor only.
current_state_read_order: Airtable Queue Control, Work Items, Plans, and Plan Tasks for live execution order
current_authority_model.github_role: control plane, governed readable source, governed helper-skill source, release history, and promoted decisions
current_authority_model.project_space_role: bootstrap/runtime anchor only; not duplicate editable readable text repository

new_table_requirements.delete_requested_field: Every current and future DCOIR Airtable table must include a delete_requested checkbox.
new_table_requirements.delete_requested_automation: Each table that may need cleanup must have its own per-table delete_requested automation validated with a scratch row.
new_table_requirements.prohibited: Do not create base-wide delete automations or test deletion with production records.

active_surface_roles.manifest: current governed GitHub readable control-plane manifest
active_surface_roles.change_log: current governed GitHub readable change log
active_surface_roles.session_handoff: promoted historical handoff; Airtable Session Checkpoints are live carry-forward state
active_surface_roles.session_resume: promoted historical resume anchor; dcoir-session-resume and Airtable are current resume authority
active_surface_roles.todo_log: promoted historical todo surface only; Airtable Queue Control/Work Items/Plan Tasks are live queue authority
active_surface_roles.todo_index: promoted historical todo index only; not live queue authority
active_surface_roles.active_now: stale/deleted todo surface; do not use as live authority

retired_or_legacy_surface_policy.dcoir_skill_memory/: migrated source_basis/history for selected skill-memory entries; dedicated Airtable skill-memory tables are the live durable memory target after validation
retired_or_legacy_surface_policy.project_settings/: legacy project-setting mirror surface; do not treat as live project-instruction authority unless explicitly reintroduced by control plane
retired_or_legacy_surface_policy.release_notes/: release-history/source_basis surface only; release index rows live in Airtable release tracking tables
retired_or_legacy_surface_policy.project_sources/todo/: stale/deleted GitHub todo surface; live todo authority is Airtable
